name: Constitution Day (Norway)
traditions: Children's parades (barnetog); wearing bunads (traditional costumes); ice cream; hot dogs; brass bands; royal family greeting at Palace.
historicalBackground: May 17 marks the signing of Norway's constitution at Eidsvoll in 1814. Uniquely, Norway celebrates with children's parades rather than military displays.
description: Norway's joyful Constitution Day, uniquely celebrated with children's parades, ice cream, and the entire nation dressed in traditional bunads.
